narrative:
Reading 2-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 988 registered voters, with 65.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.0%, a modest Republican lean of 4.8 percentage points.
